positive: A stylish, detailed geometric illustration of a majestic woodland creature (like a fox or deer) integrated with celestial and botanical elements. The main subject should feature clean, stylized silhouettes and vibrant color blocking, using emerald greens, sapphire blues, and gold accents against a cream background. Incorporate mandalas, abstract geometric patterns, and stylized flora (ferns, leaves, cosmic rings) surrounding the central creature. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, resembling a modern tapestry or print-on-fabric design. High contrast, vector illustration style, suitable for screen printing. Flat graphic design, pop art influence, digital art.
negative: low detail, blurry, amateur, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, malformed anatomy, poor lines, grain, noise, ugly, messy, cartoon, photorealistic
